task_completion.description: Verify the 'Documents' module is enabled for the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Mobile Banking App' project, the 'Documents' option is visible in the left sidebar menu, or the 'Documents' checkbox is checked in the Project Settings -> Modules page.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Specifications' document category was created globally.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Specifications' category is visible in the Administration -> Enumerations list under 'Document categories', or it is available and selected in the Category dropdown when creating or viewing the document.

task_completion.description: Verify a document titled 'Mobile App Specification v1' is created in the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document with the exact title 'Mobile App Specification v1' is visible in the Documents list or on the document's detail page within the 'Mobile Banking App' project.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is assigned to the 'Specifications' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the document detail page or list view for 'Mobile App Specification v1', the category is explicitly listed as 'Specifications'.

task_completion.description: Verify the file 'mobile_spec_v1.txt' is attached to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'mobile_spec_v1.txt' is visible in the attachments section of the 'Mobile App Specification v1' document page.

integrity.description: Check that the agent used the web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the application interface, rather than terminal windows executing API/curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application layout, headers, and menus should be visible and consistent, not mocked in a local text editor or basic HTML file.

integrity.description: Check that the file was genuinely uploaded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachment should appear as a downloadable file or attachment block in the UI, not just text typed into a description field.
